en: If you drink poison, you die.
Zero conditionals are used for facts, when the result of the condition is 100% certain.
If you water a plant, it grows.
If you don't water a plant, it dies.
A conditional sentence has two parts, the if clause and the result.
A zero conditional doesn't have to be a scientifically proven fact.
The zero conditional is just a sentence structure, and thanks to freedom of speech, you can use
